title: caprifolium bracteolare
intro: Caprifolium bracteolare, also known as the yellow honey suckle, is a plant species within the Caprifoliaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Caprifolium bracteolare include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by combining the dried flowers and leaves with water or a solvent like ethanol.
